description: Nauthilus login analytics directly from the ClickHouse logins table: outcome, identity risk, GeoIP and ASN reputation, protocol mix, latency, and defense signals.

targets.rawSql: SELECT count() AS "Attempts" FROM ${log_table:raw} WHERE $__timeFilter_ms(ts) AND $__conditionalAll(service IN (${service:singlequote}), $service) AND $__conditionalAll(proto IN (${proto:singlequote}), $proto) AND $__conditionalAll(method IN (${method:singlequote}), $method) AND $__conditionalAll(status_msg IN (${status_msg:singlequote}), $status_msg) AND $__conditionalAll(geoip_country IN (${geoip_country:singlequote}), $geoip_country) AND $__conditionalAll(toString(geoip_asn) IN (${geoip_asn:singlequote}), $geoip_asn) AND $__conditionalAll(geoip_asn_country IN (${geoip_asn_country:singlequote}), $geoip_asn_country) AND $__conditionalAll(reputation_decision IN (${reputation_decision:singlequote}), $reputation_decision) AND $__conditionalAll(geoip_status IN (${geoip_status:singlequote}), $geoip_status) AND $__conditionalAll(geoip_source IN (${geoip_source:singlequote}), $geoip_source) AND $__conditionalAll(reputation_source IN (${reputation_source:singlequote}), $reputation_source) AND $__conditionalAll(grant_type IN (${grant_type:singlequote}), $grant_type) AND (${exclude_identities:singlequote} = '' OR NOT has(splitByChar(',', ${exclude_identities:singlequote}), if(username != '', username, account)))

SELECT countIf(authenticated = 1) AS "Successful" FROM ${log_table:raw} WHERE $__timeFilter_ms(ts) AND $__conditionalAll(service IN (${service:singlequote}), $service) AND $__conditionalAll(proto IN (${proto:singlequote}), $proto) AND $__conditionalAll(method IN (${method:singlequote}), $method) AND $__conditionalAll(status_msg IN (${status_msg:singlequote}), $status_msg) AND $__conditionalAll(geoip_country IN (${geoip_country:singlequote}), $geoip_country) AND $__conditionalAll(toString(geoip_asn) IN (${geoip_asn:singlequote}), $geoip_asn) AND $__conditionalAll(geoip_asn_country IN (${geoip_asn_country:singlequote}), $geoip_asn_country) AND $__conditionalAll(reputation_decision IN (${reputation_decision:singlequote}), $reputation_decision) AND $__conditionalAll(geoip_status IN (${geoip_status:singlequote}), $geoip_status) AND $__conditionalAll(geoip_source IN (${geoip_source:singlequote}), $geoip_source) AND $__conditionalAll(reputation_source IN (${reputation_source:singlequote}), $reputation_source) AND $__conditionalAll(grant_type IN (${grant_type:singlequote}), $grant_type) AND (${exclude_identities:singlequote} = '' OR NOT has(splitByChar(',', ${exclude_identities:singlequote}), if(username != '', username, account)))

SELECT countIf(authenticated = 0) AS "Failed" FROM ${log_table:raw} WHERE $__timeFilter_ms(ts) AND $__conditionalAll(service IN (${service:singlequote}), $service) AND $__conditionalAll(proto IN (${proto:singlequote}), $proto) AND $__conditionalAll(method IN (${method:singlequote}), $method) AND $__conditionalAll(status_msg IN (${status_msg:singlequote}), $status_msg) AND $__conditionalAll(geoip_country IN (${geoip_country:singlequote}), $geoip_country) AND $__conditionalAll(toString(geoip_asn) IN (${geoip_asn:singlequote}), $geoip_asn) AND $__conditionalAll(geoip_asn_country IN (${geoip_asn_country:singlequote}), $geoip_asn_country) AND $__conditionalAll(reputation_decision IN (${reputation_decision:singlequote}), $reputation_decision) AND $__conditionalAll(geoip_status IN (${geoip_status:singlequote}), $geoip_status) AND $__conditionalAll(geoip_source IN (${geoip_source:singlequote}), $geoip_source) AND $__conditionalAll(reputation_source IN (${reputation_source:singlequote}), $reputation_source) AND $__conditionalAll(grant_type IN (${grant_type:singlequote}), $grant_type) AND (${exclude_identities:singlequote} = '' OR NOT has(splitByChar(',', ${exclude_identities:singlequote}), if(username != '', username, account)))

SELECT if(count() = 0, 0, round(100 * countIf(authenticated = 1) / count(), 2)) AS "Success rate" FROM ${log_table:raw} WHERE $__timeFilter_ms(ts) AND $__conditionalAll(service IN (${service:singlequote}), $service) AND $__conditionalAll(proto IN (${proto:singlequote}), $proto) AND $__conditionalAll(method IN (${method:singlequote}), $method) AND $__conditionalAll(status_msg IN (${status_msg:singlequote}), $status_msg) AND $__conditionalAll(geoip_country IN (${geoip_country:singlequote}), $geoip_country) AND $__conditionalAll(toString(geoip_asn) IN (${geoip_asn:singlequote}), $geoip_asn) AND $__conditionalAll(geoip_asn_country IN (${geoip_asn_country:singlequote}), $geoip_asn_country) AND $__conditionalAll(reputation_decision IN (${reputation_decision:singlequote}), $reputation_decision) AND $__conditionalAll(geoip_status IN (${geoip_status:singlequote}), $geoip_status) AND $__conditionalAll(geoip_source IN (${geoip_source:singlequote}), $geoip_source) AND $__conditionalAll(reputation_source IN (${reputation_source:singlequote}), $reputation_source) AND $__conditionalAll(grant_type IN (${grant_type:singlequote}), $grant_type) AND (${exclude_identities:singlequote} = '' OR NOT has(splitByChar(',', ${exclude_identities:singlequote}), if(username != '', username, account)))

SELECT uniqExactIf(if(username != '', username, account), username != '' OR account != '') AS "Unique users" FROM ${log_table:raw} WHERE $__timeFilter_ms(ts) AND $__conditionalAll(service IN (${service:singlequote}), $service) AND $__conditionalAll(proto IN (${proto:singlequote}), $proto) AND $__conditionalAll(method IN (${method:singlequote}), $method) AND $__conditionalAll(status_msg IN (${status_msg:singlequote}), $status_msg) AND $__conditionalAll(geoip_country IN (${geoip_country:singlequote}), $geoip_country) AND $__conditionalAll(toString(geoip_asn) IN (${geoip_asn:singlequote}), $geoip_asn) AND $__conditionalAll(geoip_asn_country IN (${geoip_asn_country:singlequote}), $geoip_asn_country) AND $__conditionalAll(reputation_decision IN (${reputation_decision:singlequote}), $reputation_decision) AND $__conditionalAll(geoip_status IN (${geoip_status:singlequote}), $geoip_status) AND $__conditionalAll(geoip_source IN (${geoip_source:singlequote}), $geoip_source) AND $__conditionalAll(reputation_source IN (${reputation_source:singlequote}), $reputation_source) AND $__conditionalAll(grant_type IN (${grant_type:singlequote}), $grant_type) AND (${exclude_identities:singlequote} = '' OR NOT has(splitByChar(',', ${exclude_identities:singlequote}), if(username != '', username, account)))

SELECT uniqExactIf(client_ip, client_ip != '') AS "Unique IPs" FROM ${log_table:raw} WHERE $__timeFilter_ms(ts) AND $__conditionalAll(service IN (${service:singlequote}), $service) AND $__conditionalAll(proto IN (${proto:singlequote}), $proto) AND $__conditionalAll(method IN (${method:singlequote}), $method) AND $__conditionalAll(status_msg IN (${status_msg:singlequote}), $status_msg) AND $__conditionalAll(geoip_country IN (${geoip_country:singlequote}), $geoip_country) AND $__conditionalAll(toString(geoip_asn) IN (${geoip_asn:singlequote}), $geoip_asn) AND $__conditionalAll(geoip_asn_country IN (${geoip_asn_country:singlequote}), $geoip_asn_country) AND $__conditionalAll(reputation_decision IN (${reputation_decision:singlequote}), $reputation_decision) AND $__conditionalAll(geoip_status IN (${geoip_status:singlequote}), $geoip_status) AND $__conditionalAll(geoip_source IN (${geoip_source:singlequote}), $geoip_source) AND $__conditionalAll(reputation_source IN (${reputation_source:singlequote}), $reputation_source) AND $__conditionalAll(grant_type IN (${grant_type:singlequote}), $grant_type) AND (${exclude_identities:singlequote} = '' OR NOT has(splitByChar(',', ${exclude_identities:singlequote}), if(username != '', username, account)))

SELECT if(count() = 0, 0, quantileTDigest(0.95)(latency)) AS "P95 latency" FROM ${log_table:raw} WHERE $__timeFilter_ms(ts) AND $__conditionalAll(service IN (${service:singlequote}), $service) AND $__conditionalAll(proto IN (${proto:singlequote}), $proto) AND $__conditionalAll(method IN (${method:singlequote}), $method) AND $__conditionalAll(status_msg IN (${status_msg:singlequote}), $status_msg) AND $__conditionalAll(geoip_country IN (${geoip_country:singlequote}), $geoip_country) AND $__conditionalAll(toString(geoip_asn) IN (${geoip_asn:singlequote}), $geoip_asn) AND $__conditionalAll(geoip_asn_country IN (${geoip_asn_country:singlequote}), $geoip_asn_country) AND $__conditionalAll(reputation_decision IN (${reputation_decision:singlequote}), $reputation_decision) AND $__conditionalAll(geoip_status IN (${geoip_status:singlequote}), $geoip_status) AND $__conditionalAll(geoip_source IN (${geoip_source:singlequote}), $geoip_source) AND $__conditionalAll(reputation_source IN (${reputation_source:singlequote}), $reputation_source) AND $__conditionalAll(grant_type IN (${grant_type:singlequote}), $grant_type) AND (${exclude_identities:singlequote} = '' OR NOT has(splitByChar(',', ${exclude_identities:singlequote}), if(username != '', username, account)))

SELECT countIf(decision_sources != '' OR prot_active = 1 OR dyn_threat > 0 OR brute_force_counter > 0 OR failed_login_count > 0 OR reputation_decision != '' OR reputation_positive_score > 0 OR repeating = 1 OR rwp = 1) AS "Defense events" FROM ${log_table:raw} WHERE $__timeFilter_ms(ts) AND $__conditionalAll(service IN (${service:singlequote}), $service) AND $__conditionalAll(proto IN (${proto:singlequote}), $proto) AND $__conditionalAll(method IN (${method:singlequote}), $method) AND $__conditionalAll(status_msg IN (${status_msg:singlequote}), $status_msg) AND $__conditionalAll(geoip_country IN (${geoip_country:singlequote}), $geoip_country) AND $__conditionalAll(toString(geoip_asn) IN (${geoip_asn:singlequote}), $geoip_asn) AND $__conditionalAll(geoip_asn_country IN (${geoip_asn_country:singlequote}), $geoip_asn_country) AND $__conditionalAll(reputation_decision IN (${reputation_decision:singlequote}), $reputation_decision) AND $__conditionalAll(geoip_status IN (${geoip_status:singlequote}), $geoip_status) AND $__conditionalAll(geoip_source IN (${geoip_source:singlequote}), $geoip_source) AND $__conditionalAll(reputation_source IN (${reputation_source:singlequote}), $reputation_source) AND $__conditionalAll(grant_type IN (${grant_type:singlequote}), $grant_type) AND (${exclude_identities:singlequote} = '' OR NOT has(splitByChar(',', ${exclude_identities:singlequote}), if(username != '', username, account)))

SELECT time, outcome, attempts FROM (SELECT $__timeInterval_ms(ts) AS time, multiIf(authenticated = 1, 'success', authenticated = 0, 'failed', 'unknown') AS outcome, count() AS attempts FROM ${log_table:raw} WHERE $__timeFilter_ms(ts) AND $__conditionalAll(service IN (${service:singlequote}), $service) AND $__conditionalAll(proto IN (${proto:singlequote}), $proto) AND $__conditionalAll(method IN (${method:singlequote}), $method) AND $__conditionalAll(status_msg IN (${status_msg:singlequote}), $status_msg) AND $__conditionalAll(geoip_country IN (${geoip_country:singlequote}), $geoip_country) AND $__conditionalAll(toString(geoip_asn) IN (${geoip_asn:singlequote}), $geoip_asn) AND $__conditionalAll(geoip_asn_country IN (${geoip_asn_country:singlequote}), $geoip_asn_country) AND $__conditionalAll(reputation_decision IN (${reputation_decision:singlequote}), $reputation_decision) AND $__conditionalAll(geoip_status IN (${geoip_status:singlequote}), $geoip_status) AND $__conditionalAll(geoip_source IN (${geoip_source:singlequote}), $geoip_source) AND $__conditionalAll(reputation_source IN (${reputation_source:singlequote}), $reputation_source) AND $__conditionalAll(grant_type IN (${grant_type:singlequote}), $grant_type) AND (${exclude_identities:singlequote} = '' OR NOT has(splitByChar(',', ${exclude_identities:singlequote}), if(username != '', username, account))) GROUP BY time, outcome) ORDER BY time

SELECT $__timeInterval_ms(ts) AS time, quantileTDigest(0.50)(latency) AS p50, quantileTDigest(0.95)(latency) AS p95, quantileTDigest(0.99)(latency) AS p99 FROM ${log_table:raw} WHERE $__timeFilter_ms(ts) AND $__conditionalAll(service IN (${service:singlequote}), $service) AND $__conditionalAll(proto IN (${proto:singlequote}), $proto) AND $__conditionalAll(method IN (${method:singlequote}), $method) AND $__conditionalAll(status_msg IN (${status_msg:singlequote}), $status_msg) AND $__conditionalAll(geoip_country IN (${geoip_country:singlequote}), $geoip_country) AND $__conditionalAll(toString(geoip_asn) IN (${geoip_asn:singlequote}), $geoip_asn) AND $__conditionalAll(geoip_asn_country IN (${geoip_asn_country:singlequote}), $geoip_asn_country) AND $__conditionalAll(reputation_decision IN (${reputation_decision:singlequote}), $reputation_decision) AND $__conditionalAll(geoip_status IN (${geoip_status:singlequote}), $geoip_status) AND $__conditionalAll(geoip_source IN (${geoip_source:singlequote}), $geoip_source) AND $__conditionalAll(reputation_source IN (${reputation_source:singlequote}), $reputation_source) AND $__conditionalAll(grant_type IN (${grant_type:singlequote}), $grant_type) AND (${exclude_identities:singlequote} = '' OR NOT has(splitByChar(',', ${exclude_identities:singlequote}), if(username != '', username, account))) GROUP BY time ORDER BY time

SELECT $__timeInterval_ms(ts) AS time, if(count() = 0, 0, round(100 * countIf(authenticated = 1) / count(), 2)) AS "success_rate" FROM ${log_table:raw} WHERE $__timeFilter_ms(ts) AND $__conditionalAll(service IN (${service:singlequote}), $service) AND $__conditionalAll(proto IN (${proto:singlequote}), $proto) AND $__conditionalAll(method IN (${method:singlequote}), $method) AND $__conditionalAll(status_msg IN (${status_msg:singlequote}), $status_msg) AND $__conditionalAll(geoip_country IN (${geoip_country:singlequote}), $geoip_country) AND $__conditionalAll(toString(geoip_asn) IN (${geoip_asn:singlequote}), $geoip_asn) AND $__conditionalAll(geoip_asn_country IN (${geoip_asn_country:singlequote}), $geoip_asn_country) AND $__conditionalAll(reputation_decision IN (${reputation_decision:singlequote}), $reputation_decision) AND $__conditionalAll(geoip_status IN (${geoip_status:singlequote}), $geoip_status) AND $__conditionalAll(geoip_source IN (${geoip_source:singlequote}), $geoip_source) AND $__conditionalAll(reputation_source IN (${reputation_source:singlequote}), $reputation_source) AND $__conditionalAll(grant_type IN (${grant_type:singlequote}), $grant_type) AND (${exclude_identities:singlequote} = '' OR NOT has(splitByChar(',', ${exclude_identities:singlequote}), if(username != '', username, account))) GROUP BY time ORDER BY time

SELECT time, status_class, requests FROM (SELECT $__timeInterval_ms(ts) AS time, if(http_status = 0, 'none', concat(toString(intDiv(http_status, 100)), 'xx')) AS status_class, count() AS requests FROM ${log_table:raw} WHERE $__timeFilter_ms(ts) AND $__conditionalAll(service IN (${service:singlequote}), $service) AND $__conditionalAll(proto IN (${proto:singlequote}), $proto) AND $__conditionalAll(method IN (${method:singlequote}), $method) AND $__conditionalAll(status_msg IN (${status_msg:singlequote}), $status_msg) AND $__conditionalAll(geoip_country IN (${geoip_country:singlequote}), $geoip_country) AND $__conditionalAll(toString(geoip_asn) IN (${geoip_asn:singlequote}), $geoip_asn) AND $__conditionalAll(geoip_asn_country IN (${geoip_asn_country:singlequote}), $geoip_asn_country) AND $__conditionalAll(reputation_decision IN (${reputation_decision:singlequote}), $reputation_decision) AND $__conditionalAll(geoip_status IN (${geoip_status:singlequote}), $geoip_status) AND $__conditionalAll(geoip_source IN (${geoip_source:singlequote}), $geoip_source) AND $__conditionalAll(reputation_source IN (${reputation_source:singlequote}), $reputation_source) AND $__conditionalAll(grant_type IN (${grant_type:singlequote}), $grant_type) AND (${exclude_identities:singlequote} = '' OR NOT has(splitByChar(',', ${exclude_identities:singlequote}), if(username != '', username, account))) GROUP BY time, status_class) ORDER BY time

SELECT concat(if(proto = '', 'unknown', proto), ' / ', if(method = '', 'unknown', method)) AS slice, count() AS attempts FROM ${log_table:raw} WHERE $__timeFilter_ms(ts) AND $__conditionalAll(service IN (${service:singlequote}), $service) AND $__conditionalAll(proto IN (${proto:singlequote}), $proto) AND $__conditionalAll(method IN (${method:singlequote}), $method) AND $__conditionalAll(status_msg IN (${status_msg:singlequote}), $status_msg) AND $__conditionalAll(geoip_country IN (${geoip_country:singlequote}), $geoip_country) AND $__conditionalAll(toString(geoip_asn) IN (${geoip_asn:singlequote}), $geoip_asn) AND $__conditionalAll(geoip_asn_country IN (${geoip_asn_country:singlequote}), $geoip_asn_country) AND $__conditionalAll(reputation_decision IN (${reputation_decision:singlequote}), $reputation_decision) AND $__conditionalAll(geoip_status IN (${geoip_status:singlequote}), $geoip_status) AND $__conditionalAll(geoip_source IN (${geoip_source:singlequote}), $geoip_source) AND $__conditionalAll(reputation_source IN (${reputation_source:singlequote}), $reputation_source) AND $__conditionalAll(grant_type IN (${grant_type:singlequote}), $grant_type) AND (${exclude_identities:singlequote} = '' OR NOT has(splitByChar(',', ${exclude_identities:singlequote}), if(username != '', username, account))) GROUP BY slice ORDER BY attempts DESC LIMIT 12

SELECT if(username = '', if(account = '', 'unknown', account), username) AS identity, count() AS failures, uniqExactIf(client_ip, client_ip != '') AS source_ips, max(failed_login_count) AS max_failed_count, max(failed_login_rank) AS best_failed_rank, argMax(status_msg, ts) AS latest_status FROM ${log_table:raw} WHERE $__timeFilter_ms(ts) AND $__conditionalAll(service IN (${service:singlequote}), $service) AND $__conditionalAll(proto IN (${proto:singlequote}), $proto) AND $__conditionalAll(method IN (${method:singlequote}), $method) AND $__conditionalAll(status_msg IN (${status_msg:singlequote}), $status_msg) AND $__conditionalAll(geoip_country IN (${geoip_country:singlequote}), $geoip_country) AND $__conditionalAll(toString(geoip_asn) IN (${geoip_asn:singlequote}), $geoip_asn) AND $__conditionalAll(geoip_asn_country IN (${geoip_asn_country:singlequote}), $geoip_asn_country) AND $__conditionalAll(reputation_decision IN (${reputation_decision:singlequote}), $reputation_decision) AND $__conditionalAll(geoip_status IN (${geoip_status:singlequote}), $geoip_status) AND $__conditionalAll(geoip_source IN (${geoip_source:singlequote}), $geoip_source) AND $__conditionalAll(reputation_source IN (${reputation_source:singlequote}), $reputation_source) AND $__conditionalAll(grant_type IN (${grant_type:singlequote}), $grant_type) AND (${exclude_identities:singlequote} = '' OR NOT has(splitByChar(',', ${exclude_identities:singlequote}), if(username != '', username, account))) AND authenticated = 0 GROUP BY identity ORDER BY failures DESC LIMIT 25

SELECT client_ip, argMax(geoip_country, ts) AS country, argMax(geoip_asn, ts) AS asn, argMax(geoip_asn_org, ts) AS asn_org, count() AS attempts, countIf(authenticated = 0) AS failures, round(100 * countIf(authenticated = 0) / count(), 2) AS failure_rate, uniqExactIf(username, username != '') AS identities, max(dyn_threat) AS max_threat, max(reputation_positive_score) AS risky_score, max(reputation_negative_score) AS trusted_score, max(reputation_samples) AS reputation_samples, argMax(reputation_decision, ts) AS reputation_decision, max(prot_delay_ms) AS max_delay_ms FROM ${log_table:raw} WHERE $__timeFilter_ms(ts) AND $__conditionalAll(service IN (${service:singlequote}), $service) AND $__conditionalAll(proto IN (${proto:singlequote}), $proto) AND $__conditionalAll(method IN (${method:singlequote}), $method) AND $__conditionalAll(status_msg IN (${status_msg:singlequote}), $status_msg) AND $__conditionalAll(geoip_country IN (${geoip_country:singlequote}), $geoip_country) AND $__conditionalAll(toString(geoip_asn) IN (${geoip_asn:singlequote}), $geoip_asn) AND $__conditionalAll(geoip_asn_country IN (${geoip_asn_country:singlequote}), $geoip_asn_country) AND $__conditionalAll(reputation_decision IN (${reputation_decision:singlequote}), $reputation_decision) AND $__conditionalAll(geoip_status IN (${geoip_status:singlequote}), $geoip_status) AND $__conditionalAll(geoip_source IN (${geoip_source:singlequote}), $geoip_source) AND $__conditionalAll(reputation_source IN (${reputation_source:singlequote}), $reputation_source) AND $__conditionalAll(grant_type IN (${grant_type:singlequote}), $grant_type) AND (${exclude_identities:singlequote} = '' OR NOT has(splitByChar(',', ${exclude_identities:singlequote}), if(username != '', username, account))) AND client_ip != '' GROUP BY client_ip ORDER BY failures DESC, attempts DESC LIMIT 50

panels.description: Country-level login outcome map. Marker size follows total attempts; marker color uses a colorblind-friendly blue/yellow/orange/purple scale for failed-login percentage.

targets.rawSql: SELECT geoip_country AS lookup, geoip_country AS country, count() AS attempts, countIf(authenticated = 1) AS successful, countIf(authenticated = 0) AS failed, round(100 * countIf(authenticated = 0) / count(), 2) AS failure_rate, uniqExactIf(client_ip, client_ip != '') AS source_ips, uniqExactIf(if(username != '', username, account), username != '' OR account != '') AS identities, max(dyn_threat) AS max_threat FROM ${log_table:raw} WHERE $__timeFilter_ms(ts) AND $__conditionalAll(service IN (${service:singlequote}), $service) AND $__conditionalAll(proto IN (${proto:singlequote}), $proto) AND $__conditionalAll(method IN (${method:singlequote}), $method) AND $__conditionalAll(status_msg IN (${status_msg:singlequote}), $status_msg) AND $__conditionalAll(geoip_country IN (${geoip_country:singlequote}), $geoip_country) AND $__conditionalAll(toString(geoip_asn) IN (${geoip_asn:singlequote}), $geoip_asn) AND $__conditionalAll(geoip_asn_country IN (${geoip_asn_country:singlequote}), $geoip_asn_country) AND $__conditionalAll(reputation_decision IN (${reputation_decision:singlequote}), $reputation_decision) AND $__conditionalAll(geoip_status IN (${geoip_status:singlequote}), $geoip_status) AND $__conditionalAll(geoip_source IN (${geoip_source:singlequote}), $geoip_source) AND $__conditionalAll(reputation_source IN (${reputation_source:singlequote}), $reputation_source) AND $__conditionalAll(grant_type IN (${grant_type:singlequote}), $grant_type) AND (${exclude_identities:singlequote} = '' OR NOT has(splitByChar(',', ${exclude_identities:singlequote}), if(username != '', username, account))) AND geoip_country != '' GROUP BY geoip_country ORDER BY failed DESC, attempts DESC LIMIT 250

panels.title: Country outcome world map

targets.rawSql: SELECT if(geoip_country = '', 'unknown', geoip_country) AS country, count() AS attempts, countIf(authenticated = 0) AS failures FROM ${log_table:raw} WHERE $__timeFilter_ms(ts) AND $__conditionalAll(service IN (${service:singlequote}), $service) AND $__conditionalAll(proto IN (${proto:singlequote}), $proto) AND $__conditionalAll(method IN (${method:singlequote}), $method) AND $__conditionalAll(status_msg IN (${status_msg:singlequote}), $status_msg) AND $__conditionalAll(geoip_country IN (${geoip_country:singlequote}), $geoip_country) AND $__conditionalAll(toString(geoip_asn) IN (${geoip_asn:singlequote}), $geoip_asn) AND $__conditionalAll(geoip_asn_country IN (${geoip_asn_country:singlequote}), $geoip_asn_country) AND $__conditionalAll(reputation_decision IN (${reputation_decision:singlequote}), $reputation_decision) AND $__conditionalAll(geoip_status IN (${geoip_status:singlequote}), $geoip_status) AND $__conditionalAll(geoip_source IN (${geoip_source:singlequote}), $geoip_source) AND $__conditionalAll(reputation_source IN (${reputation_source:singlequote}), $reputation_source) AND $__conditionalAll(grant_type IN (${grant_type:singlequote}), $grant_type) AND (${exclude_identities:singlequote} = '' OR NOT has(splitByChar(',', ${exclude_identities:singlequote}), if(username != '', username, account))) GROUP BY country ORDER BY attempts DESC LIMIT 30

SELECT time, user_state, attempts FROM (SELECT $__timeInterval_ms(ts) AS time, multiIf(user_found = 1, 'known user', user_found = 0, 'unknown user', 'not reported') AS user_state, count() AS attempts FROM ${log_table:raw} WHERE $__timeFilter_ms(ts) AND $__conditionalAll(service IN (${service:singlequote}), $service) AND $__conditionalAll(proto IN (${proto:singlequote}), $proto) AND $__conditionalAll(method IN (${method:singlequote}), $method) AND $__conditionalAll(status_msg IN (${status_msg:singlequote}), $status_msg) AND $__conditionalAll(geoip_country IN (${geoip_country:singlequote}), $geoip_country) AND $__conditionalAll(toString(geoip_asn) IN (${geoip_asn:singlequote}), $geoip_asn) AND $__conditionalAll(geoip_asn_country IN (${geoip_asn_country:singlequote}), $geoip_asn_country) AND $__conditionalAll(reputation_decision IN (${reputation_decision:singlequote}), $reputation_decision) AND $__conditionalAll(geoip_status IN (${geoip_status:singlequote}), $geoip_status) AND $__conditionalAll(geoip_source IN (${geoip_source:singlequote}), $geoip_source) AND $__conditionalAll(reputation_source IN (${reputation_source:singlequote}), $reputation_source) AND $__conditionalAll(grant_type IN (${grant_type:singlequote}), $grant_type) AND (${exclude_identities:singlequote} = '' OR NOT has(splitByChar(',', ${exclude_identities:singlequote}), if(username != '', username, account))) GROUP BY time, user_state) ORDER BY time

SELECT if(user_agent = '', 'unknown', user_agent) AS user_agent, count() AS attempts, countIf(authenticated = 0) AS failures, round(100 * countIf(authenticated = 0) / count(), 2) AS failure_rate, uniqExactIf(client_ip, client_ip != '') AS source_ips FROM ${log_table:raw} WHERE $__timeFilter_ms(ts) AND $__conditionalAll(service IN (${service:singlequote}), $service) AND $__conditionalAll(proto IN (${proto:singlequote}), $proto) AND $__conditionalAll(method IN (${method:singlequote}), $method) AND $__conditionalAll(status_msg IN (${status_msg:singlequote}), $status_msg) AND $__conditionalAll(geoip_country IN (${geoip_country:singlequote}), $geoip_country) AND $__conditionalAll(toString(geoip_asn) IN (${geoip_asn:singlequote}), $geoip_asn) AND $__conditionalAll(geoip_asn_country IN (${geoip_asn_country:singlequote}), $geoip_asn_country) AND $__conditionalAll(reputation_decision IN (${reputation_decision:singlequote}), $reputation_decision) AND $__conditionalAll(geoip_status IN (${geoip_status:singlequote}), $geoip_status) AND $__conditionalAll(geoip_source IN (${geoip_source:singlequote}), $geoip_source) AND $__conditionalAll(reputation_source IN (${reputation_source:singlequote}), $reputation_source) AND $__conditionalAll(grant_type IN (${grant_type:singlequote}), $grant_type) AND (${exclude_identities:singlequote} = '' OR NOT has(splitByChar(',', ${exclude_identities:singlequote}), if(username != '', username, account))) GROUP BY user_agent ORDER BY attempts DESC LIMIT 20

SELECT time, decision, attempts FROM (SELECT $__timeInterval_ms(ts) AS time, if(reputation_decision = '', 'none', reputation_decision) AS decision, count() AS attempts FROM ${log_table:raw} WHERE $__timeFilter_ms(ts) AND $__conditionalAll(service IN (${service:singlequote}), $service) AND $__conditionalAll(proto IN (${proto:singlequote}), $proto) AND $__conditionalAll(method IN (${method:singlequote}), $method) AND $__conditionalAll(status_msg IN (${status_msg:singlequote}), $status_msg) AND $__conditionalAll(geoip_country IN (${geoip_country:singlequote}), $geoip_country) AND $__conditionalAll(toString(geoip_asn) IN (${geoip_asn:singlequote}), $geoip_asn) AND $__conditionalAll(geoip_asn_country IN (${geoip_asn_country:singlequote}), $geoip_asn_country) AND $__conditionalAll(reputation_decision IN (${reputation_decision:singlequote}), $reputation_decision) AND $__conditionalAll(geoip_status IN (${geoip_status:singlequote}), $geoip_status) AND $__conditionalAll(geoip_source IN (${geoip_source:singlequote}), $geoip_source) AND $__conditionalAll(reputation_source IN (${reputation_source:singlequote}), $reputation_source) AND $__conditionalAll(grant_type IN (${grant_type:singlequote}), $grant_type) AND (${exclude_identities:singlequote} = '' OR NOT has(splitByChar(',', ${exclude_identities:singlequote}), if(username != '', username, account))) AND reputation_decision != '' GROUP BY time, decision) ORDER BY time

SELECT $__timeInterval_ms(ts) AS time, avg(reputation_score) AS avg_score, quantileTDigest(0.95)(reputation_positive_score) AS p95_risky_score, quantileTDigest(0.95)(reputation_negative_score) AS p95_trusted_score, max(reputation_samples) AS max_samples FROM ${log_table:raw} WHERE $__timeFilter_ms(ts) AND $__conditionalAll(service IN (${service:singlequote}), $service) AND $__conditionalAll(proto IN (${proto:singlequote}), $proto) AND $__conditionalAll(method IN (${method:singlequote}), $method) AND $__conditionalAll(status_msg IN (${status_msg:singlequote}), $status_msg) AND $__conditionalAll(geoip_country IN (${geoip_country:singlequote}), $geoip_country) AND $__conditionalAll(toString(geoip_asn) IN (${geoip_asn:singlequote}), $geoip_asn) AND $__conditionalAll(geoip_asn_country IN (${geoip_asn_country:singlequote}), $geoip_asn_country) AND $__conditionalAll(reputation_decision IN (${reputation_decision:singlequote}), $reputation_decision) AND $__conditionalAll(geoip_status IN (${geoip_status:singlequote}), $geoip_status) AND $__conditionalAll(geoip_source IN (${geoip_source:singlequote}), $geoip_source) AND $__conditionalAll(reputation_source IN (${reputation_source:singlequote}), $reputation_source) AND $__conditionalAll(grant_type IN (${grant_type:singlequote}), $grant_type) AND (${exclude_identities:singlequote} = '' OR NOT has(splitByChar(',', ${exclude_identities:singlequote}), if(username != '', username, account))) AND (reputation_score IS NOT NULL OR reputation_positive_score IS NOT NULL OR reputation_negative_score IS NOT NULL) GROUP BY time ORDER BY time

SELECT client_ip, argMax(geoip_country, ts) AS country, argMax(geoip_asn, ts) AS asn, argMax(geoip_asn_org, ts) AS asn_org, count() AS attempts, countIf(authenticated = 0) AS failures, round(100 * countIf(authenticated = 0) / count(), 2) AS failure_rate, max(reputation_score) AS max_score, max(reputation_positive_score) AS risky_score, max(reputation_negative_score) AS trusted_score, max(reputation_samples) AS samples, argMax(reputation_decision, ts) AS latest_decision FROM ${log_table:raw} WHERE $__timeFilter_ms(ts) AND $__conditionalAll(service IN (${service:singlequote}), $service) AND $__conditionalAll(proto IN (${proto:singlequote}), $proto) AND $__conditionalAll(method IN (${method:singlequote}), $method) AND $__conditionalAll(status_msg IN (${status_msg:singlequote}), $status_msg) AND $__conditionalAll(geoip_country IN (${geoip_country:singlequote}), $geoip_country) AND $__conditionalAll(toString(geoip_asn) IN (${geoip_asn:singlequote}), $geoip_asn) AND $__conditionalAll(geoip_asn_country IN (${geoip_asn_country:singlequote}), $geoip_asn_country) AND $__conditionalAll(reputation_decision IN (${reputation_decision:singlequote}), $reputation_decision) AND $__conditionalAll(geoip_status IN (${geoip_status:singlequote}), $geoip_status) AND $__conditionalAll(geoip_source IN (${geoip_source:singlequote}), $geoip_source) AND $__conditionalAll(reputation_source IN (${reputation_source:singlequote}), $reputation_source) AND $__conditionalAll(grant_type IN (${grant_type:singlequote}), $grant_type) AND (${exclude_identities:singlequote} = '' OR NOT has(splitByChar(',', ${exclude_identities:singlequote}), if(username != '', username, account))) AND client_ip != '' AND (reputation_decision != '' OR reputation_score IS NOT NULL OR reputation_positive_score IS NOT NULL) GROUP BY client_ip ORDER BY risky_score DESC, failures DESC, attempts DESC LIMIT 50

SELECT time, source, events FROM (SELECT $__timeInterval_ms(ts) AS time, arrayJoin(arrayFilter(x -> x != '', splitByChar(',', decision_sources))) AS source, count() AS events FROM ${log_table:raw} WHERE $__timeFilter_ms(ts) AND $__conditionalAll(service IN (${service:singlequote}), $service) AND $__conditionalAll(proto IN (${proto:singlequote}), $proto) AND $__conditionalAll(method IN (${method:singlequote}), $method) AND $__conditionalAll(status_msg IN (${status_msg:singlequote}), $status_msg) AND $__conditionalAll(geoip_country IN (${geoip_country:singlequote}), $geoip_country) AND $__conditionalAll(toString(geoip_asn) IN (${geoip_asn:singlequote}), $geoip_asn) AND $__conditionalAll(geoip_asn_country IN (${geoip_asn_country:singlequote}), $geoip_asn_country) AND $__conditionalAll(reputation_decision IN (${reputation_decision:singlequote}), $reputation_decision) AND $__conditionalAll(geoip_status IN (${geoip_status:singlequote}), $geoip_status) AND $__conditionalAll(geoip_source IN (${geoip_source:singlequote}), $geoip_source) AND $__conditionalAll(reputation_source IN (${reputation_source:singlequote}), $reputation_source) AND $__conditionalAll(grant_type IN (${grant_type:singlequote}), $grant_type) AND (${exclude_identities:singlequote} = '' OR NOT has(splitByChar(',', ${exclude_identities:singlequote}), if(username != '', username, account))) AND decision_sources != '' GROUP BY time, source) ORDER BY time

panels.description: Shows only requests for which Nauthilus exported a triggered brute-force bucket, a non-zero brute-force counter, or a failed-login hotspot count. Ordinary failures, RWP allowances, blocklist and RBL rejections are shown separately below.

targets.rawSql: SELECT if(brute_force_bucket = '', 'none', brute_force_bucket) AS bucket, count() AS attempts, countIf(authenticated = 0) AS failures, max(brute_force_counter) AS max_counter, max(failed_login_count) AS max_failed_count, uniqExactIf(client_ip, client_ip != '') AS source_ips, uniqExactIf(username, username != '') AS identities FROM ${log_table:raw} WHERE $__timeFilter_ms(ts) AND $__conditionalAll(service IN (${service:singlequote}), $service) AND $__conditionalAll(proto IN (${proto:singlequote}), $proto) AND $__conditionalAll(method IN (${method:singlequote}), $method) AND $__conditionalAll(status_msg IN (${status_msg:singlequote}), $status_msg) AND $__conditionalAll(geoip_country IN (${geoip_country:singlequote}), $geoip_country) AND $__conditionalAll(toString(geoip_asn) IN (${geoip_asn:singlequote}), $geoip_asn) AND $__conditionalAll(geoip_asn_country IN (${geoip_asn_country:singlequote}), $geoip_asn_country) AND $__conditionalAll(reputation_decision IN (${reputation_decision:singlequote}), $reputation_decision) AND $__conditionalAll(geoip_status IN (${geoip_status:singlequote}), $geoip_status) AND $__conditionalAll(geoip_source IN (${geoip_source:singlequote}), $geoip_source) AND $__conditionalAll(reputation_source IN (${reputation_source:singlequote}), $reputation_source) AND $__conditionalAll(grant_type IN (${grant_type:singlequote}), $grant_type) AND (${exclude_identities:singlequote} = '' OR NOT has(splitByChar(',', ${exclude_identities:singlequote}), if(username != '', username, account))) AND (brute_force_bucket != '' OR brute_force_counter > 0 OR failed_login_count > 0) GROUP BY bucket ORDER BY failures DESC, attempts DESC LIMIT 30

panels.title: Triggered brute-force buckets

targets.rawSql: SELECT if(dyn_response = '', 'none', dyn_response) AS response, if(prot_reason = '', 'none', prot_reason) AS protection_reason, count() AS events, max(dyn_threat) AS max_threat, uniqExactIf(client_ip, client_ip != '') AS source_ips, quantileTDigest(0.95)(prot_delay_ms) AS p95_delay_ms FROM ${log_table:raw} WHERE $__timeFilter_ms(ts) AND $__conditionalAll(service IN (${service:singlequote}), $service) AND $__conditionalAll(proto IN (${proto:singlequote}), $proto) AND $__conditionalAll(method IN (${method:singlequote}), $method) AND $__conditionalAll(status_msg IN (${status_msg:singlequote}), $status_msg) AND $__conditionalAll(geoip_country IN (${geoip_country:singlequote}), $geoip_country) AND $__conditionalAll(toString(geoip_asn) IN (${geoip_asn:singlequote}), $geoip_asn) AND $__conditionalAll(geoip_asn_country IN (${geoip_asn_country:singlequote}), $geoip_asn_country) AND $__conditionalAll(reputation_decision IN (${reputation_decision:singlequote}), $reputation_decision) AND $__conditionalAll(geoip_status IN (${geoip_status:singlequote}), $geoip_status) AND $__conditionalAll(geoip_source IN (${geoip_source:singlequote}), $geoip_source) AND $__conditionalAll(reputation_source IN (${reputation_source:singlequote}), $reputation_source) AND $__conditionalAll(grant_type IN (${grant_type:singlequote}), $grant_type) AND (${exclude_identities:singlequote} = '' OR NOT has(splitByChar(',', ${exclude_identities:singlequote}), if(username != '', username, account))) AND (dyn_threat > 0 OR dyn_response != '' OR prot_active = 1) GROUP BY response, protection_reason ORDER BY events DESC LIMIT 30

SELECT multiIf(oidc_cid != '', concat('oidc:', oidc_cid), saml_entity_id != '', concat('saml:', saml_entity_id), 'none') AS client, if(grant_type = '', 'n/a', grant_type) AS grant_type, if(mfa_method = '', 'none', mfa_method) AS mfa_method, count() AS attempts, countIf(authenticated = 1) AS successful, countIf(authenticated = 0) AS failed, uniqExactIf(username, username != '') AS users FROM ${log_table:raw} WHERE $__timeFilter_ms(ts) AND $__conditionalAll(service IN (${service:singlequote}), $service) AND $__conditionalAll(proto IN (${proto:singlequote}), $proto) AND $__conditionalAll(method IN (${method:singlequote}), $method) AND $__conditionalAll(status_msg IN (${status_msg:singlequote}), $status_msg) AND $__conditionalAll(geoip_country IN (${geoip_country:singlequote}), $geoip_country) AND $__conditionalAll(toString(geoip_asn) IN (${geoip_asn:singlequote}), $geoip_asn) AND $__conditionalAll(geoip_asn_country IN (${geoip_asn_country:singlequote}), $geoip_asn_country) AND $__conditionalAll(reputation_decision IN (${reputation_decision:singlequote}), $reputation_decision) AND $__conditionalAll(geoip_status IN (${geoip_status:singlequote}), $geoip_status) AND $__conditionalAll(geoip_source IN (${geoip_source:singlequote}), $geoip_source) AND $__conditionalAll(reputation_source IN (${reputation_source:singlequote}), $reputation_source) AND $__conditionalAll(grant_type IN (${grant_type:singlequote}), $grant_type) AND (${exclude_identities:singlequote} = '' OR NOT has(splitByChar(',', ${exclude_identities:singlequote}), if(username != '', username, account))) AND (oidc_cid != '' OR saml_entity_id != '' OR grant_type != '' OR mfa_method != '') GROUP BY client, grant_type, mfa_method ORDER BY attempts DESC LIMIT 50

panels.description: Broader security activity before a brute-force bucket triggers. Signals can overlap: one request may contribute to multiple series. Public password failures exclude loopback and RFC1918 client addresses.

targets.rawSql: SELECT time, signal, count() AS events FROM (SELECT $__timeInterval_ms(ts) AS time, arrayJoin(arrayFilter(x -> x != '', [if(brute_force_bucket != '' OR ifNull(brute_force_counter, 0) > 0, 'triggered brute force', ''), if(ifNull(failed_login_count, 0) > 0 OR position(decision_sources, 'failed_login_hotspot') > 0, 'failed-login hotspot', ''), if(ifNull(rwp, 0) = 1, 'RWP allowance', ''), if(ifNull(repeating, 0) = 1, 'repeat/replay', ''), if(position(decision_sources, 'blocklist') > 0, 'blocklist rejection', ''), if(position(decision_sources, 'rbl') > 0, 'RBL rejection', ''), if(authenticated = 0 AND status_msg = 'Invalid login or password' AND client_ip != '' AND NOT (isIPAddressInRange(client_ip, '10.0.0.0/8') OR isIPAddressInRange(client_ip, '172.16.0.0/12') OR isIPAddressInRange(client_ip, '192.168.0.0/16') OR isIPAddressInRange(client_ip, '127.0.0.0/8')), 'public password failure', '')])) AS signal FROM ${log_table:raw} WHERE $__timeFilter_ms(ts) AND $__conditionalAll(service IN (${service:singlequote}), $service) AND $__conditionalAll(proto IN (${proto:singlequote}), $proto) AND $__conditionalAll(method IN (${method:singlequote}), $method) AND $__conditionalAll(status_msg IN (${status_msg:singlequote}), $status_msg) AND $__conditionalAll(geoip_country IN (${geoip_country:singlequote}), $geoip_country) AND $__conditionalAll(toString(geoip_asn) IN (${geoip_asn:singlequote}), $geoip_asn) AND $__conditionalAll(geoip_asn_country IN (${geoip_asn_country:singlequote}), $geoip_asn_country) AND $__conditionalAll(reputation_decision IN (${reputation_decision:singlequote}), $reputation_decision) AND $__conditionalAll(geoip_status IN (${geoip_status:singlequote}), $geoip_status) AND $__conditionalAll(geoip_source IN (${geoip_source:singlequote}), $geoip_source) AND $__conditionalAll(reputation_source IN (${reputation_source:singlequote}), $reputation_source) AND $__conditionalAll(grant_type IN (${grant_type:singlequote}), $grant_type) AND (${exclude_identities:singlequote} = '' OR NOT has(splitByChar(',', ${exclude_identities:singlequote}), if(username != '', username, account)))) GROUP BY time, signal ORDER BY time

panels.description: Requests matched by retained Tor, VPN, proxy, relay, or hosting evidence. Hosting remains a separate classification and does not imply VPN.

targets.rawSql: SELECT countIf(geoip_privacy_detected = 1 OR geoip_is_hosting_network = 1) AS "Privacy-attributed" FROM ${log_table:raw} WHERE $__timeFilter_ms(ts) AND $__conditionalAll(service IN (${service:singlequote}), $service) AND $__conditionalAll(proto IN (${proto:singlequote}), $proto) AND $__conditionalAll(method IN (${method:singlequote}), $method) AND $__conditionalAll(status_msg IN (${status_msg:singlequote}), $status_msg) AND $__conditionalAll(geoip_country IN (${geoip_country:singlequote}), $geoip_country) AND $__conditionalAll(toString(geoip_asn) IN (${geoip_asn:singlequote}), $geoip_asn) AND $__conditionalAll(geoip_asn_country IN (${geoip_asn_country:singlequote}), $geoip_asn_country) AND $__conditionalAll(reputation_decision IN (${reputation_decision:singlequote}), $reputation_decision) AND $__conditionalAll(geoip_status IN (${geoip_status:singlequote}), $geoip_status) AND $__conditionalAll(geoip_source IN (${geoip_source:singlequote}), $geoip_source) AND $__conditionalAll(reputation_source IN (${reputation_source:singlequote}), $reputation_source) AND $__conditionalAll(grant_type IN (${grant_type:singlequote}), $grant_type) AND (${exclude_identities:singlequote} = '' OR NOT has(splitByChar(',', ${exclude_identities:singlequote}), if(username != '', username, account)))

targets.rawSql: SELECT countIf(geoip_privacy_data_stale = 1) AS "Stale privacy evidence" FROM ${log_table:raw} WHERE $__timeFilter_ms(ts) AND $__conditionalAll(service IN (${service:singlequote}), $service) AND $__conditionalAll(proto IN (${proto:singlequote}), $proto) AND $__conditionalAll(method IN (${method:singlequote}), $method) AND $__conditionalAll(status_msg IN (${status_msg:singlequote}), $status_msg) AND $__conditionalAll(geoip_country IN (${geoip_country:singlequote}), $geoip_country) AND $__conditionalAll(toString(geoip_asn) IN (${geoip_asn:singlequote}), $geoip_asn) AND $__conditionalAll(geoip_asn_country IN (${geoip_asn_country:singlequote}), $geoip_asn_country) AND $__conditionalAll(reputation_decision IN (${reputation_decision:singlequote}), $reputation_decision) AND $__conditionalAll(geoip_status IN (${geoip_status:singlequote}), $geoip_status) AND $__conditionalAll(geoip_source IN (${geoip_source:singlequote}), $geoip_source) AND $__conditionalAll(reputation_source IN (${reputation_source:singlequote}), $reputation_source) AND $__conditionalAll(grant_type IN (${grant_type:singlequote}), $grant_type) AND (${exclude_identities:singlequote} = '' OR NOT has(splitByChar(',', ${exclude_identities:singlequote}), if(username != '', username, account)))

panels.title: Stale privacy evidence

panels.description: Observational network-privacy classifications. A signal is evidence; policy remains the decision authority.

targets.rawSql: SELECT time, signal, events FROM (SELECT $__timeInterval_ms(ts) AS time, arrayJoin(arrayFilter(x -> x != '', [if(geoip_is_tor_exit_node = 1, 'Tor exit', ''), if(geoip_is_known_vpn_exit = 1, 'known VPN', ''), if(geoip_is_community_vpn_exit = 1, 'community VPN', ''), if(geoip_is_public_proxy = 1, 'public proxy', ''), if(geoip_is_privacy_relay = 1, 'privacy relay', ''), if(geoip_is_hosting_network = 1, 'hosting network', ''), if(geoip_privacy_data_stale = 1, 'stale evidence', '')])) AS signal, count() AS events FROM ${log_table:raw} WHERE $__timeFilter_ms(ts) AND $__conditionalAll(service IN (${service:singlequote}), $service) AND $__conditionalAll(proto IN (${proto:singlequote}), $proto) AND $__conditionalAll(method IN (${method:singlequote}), $method) AND $__conditionalAll(status_msg IN (${status_msg:singlequote}), $status_msg) AND $__conditionalAll(geoip_country IN (${geoip_country:singlequote}), $geoip_country) AND $__conditionalAll(toString(geoip_asn) IN (${geoip_asn:singlequote}), $geoip_asn) AND $__conditionalAll(geoip_asn_country IN (${geoip_asn_country:singlequote}), $geoip_asn_country) AND $__conditionalAll(reputation_decision IN (${reputation_decision:singlequote}), $reputation_decision) AND $__conditionalAll(geoip_status IN (${geoip_status:singlequote}), $geoip_status) AND $__conditionalAll(geoip_source IN (${geoip_source:singlequote}), $geoip_source) AND $__conditionalAll(reputation_source IN (${reputation_source:singlequote}), $reputation_source) AND $__conditionalAll(grant_type IN (${grant_type:singlequote}), $grant_type) AND (${exclude_identities:singlequote} = '' OR NOT has(splitByChar(',', ${exclude_identities:singlequote}), if(username != '', username, account))) AND (geoip_privacy_detected = 1 OR geoip_is_hosting_network = 1 OR geoip_privacy_data_stale = 1) GROUP BY time, signal) ORDER BY time

panels.title: Privacy signals over time

panels.description: Aggregate classification volume, outcomes, source IPs, and identities. Hosting remains separate from VPN.

targets.rawSql: SELECT signal, count() AS attempts, countIf(authenticated = 0) AS failures, uniqExactIf(client_ip, client_ip != '') AS source_ips, uniqExactIf(if(username != '', username, account), if(username != '', username, account) != '') AS identities FROM (SELECT *, arrayJoin(arrayFilter(x -> x != '', [if(geoip_is_tor_exit_node = 1, 'Tor exit', ''), if(geoip_is_known_vpn_exit = 1, 'known VPN', ''), if(geoip_is_community_vpn_exit = 1, 'community VPN', ''), if(geoip_is_public_proxy = 1, 'public proxy', ''), if(geoip_is_privacy_relay = 1, 'privacy relay', ''), if(geoip_is_hosting_network = 1, 'hosting network', ''), if(geoip_privacy_data_stale = 1, 'stale evidence', '')])) AS signal FROM ${log_table:raw} WHERE $__timeFilter_ms(ts) AND $__conditionalAll(service IN (${service:singlequote}), $service) AND $__conditionalAll(proto IN (${proto:singlequote}), $proto) AND $__conditionalAll(method IN (${method:singlequote}), $method) AND $__conditionalAll(status_msg IN (${status_msg:singlequote}), $status_msg) AND $__conditionalAll(geoip_country IN (${geoip_country:singlequote}), $geoip_country) AND $__conditionalAll(toString(geoip_asn) IN (${geoip_asn:singlequote}), $geoip_asn) AND $__conditionalAll(geoip_asn_country IN (${geoip_asn_country:singlequote}), $geoip_asn_country) AND $__conditionalAll(reputation_decision IN (${reputation_decision:singlequote}), $reputation_decision) AND $__conditionalAll(geoip_status IN (${geoip_status:singlequote}), $geoip_status) AND $__conditionalAll(geoip_source IN (${geoip_source:singlequote}), $geoip_source) AND $__conditionalAll(reputation_source IN (${reputation_source:singlequote}), $reputation_source) AND $__conditionalAll(grant_type IN (${grant_type:singlequote}), $grant_type) AND (${exclude_identities:singlequote} = '' OR NOT has(splitByChar(',', ${exclude_identities:singlequote}), if(username != '', username, account))) AND (geoip_privacy_detected = 1 OR geoip_is_hosting_network = 1 OR geoip_privacy_data_stale = 1)) GROUP BY signal ORDER BY attempts DESC

panels.title: Privacy classifications

panels.description: Recent requests carrying privacy, hosting, or stale-evidence facts. Confidence is evidence confidence, not authentication risk.

targets.rawSql: SELECT ts AS time, deployment, instance, service, proto, method, if(username = '', account, username) AS identity, client_ip, geoip_country AS country, geoip_asn, geoip_asn_org, geoip_privacy_lookup_state AS lookup_state, geoip_privacy_classes AS privacy_classes, geoip_privacy_primary_class AS primary_class, geoip_privacy_confidence AS confidence, geoip_privacy_source_authorities AS authorities, geoip_privacy_data_age_seconds AS data_age_seconds, geoip_privacy_data_stale AS stale, geoip_is_tor_exit_node AS tor_exit, geoip_is_known_vpn_exit AS known_vpn, geoip_is_community_vpn_exit AS community_vpn, geoip_is_public_proxy AS public_proxy, geoip_is_privacy_relay AS privacy_relay, geoip_is_hosting_network AS hosting_network, multiIf(authenticated = 1, 'success', authenticated = 0, 'failed', 'unknown') AS outcome, status_msg, decision_sources, session FROM ${log_table:raw} WHERE $__timeFilter_ms(ts) AND $__conditionalAll(service IN (${service:singlequote}), $service) AND $__conditionalAll(proto IN (${proto:singlequote}), $proto) AND $__conditionalAll(method IN (${method:singlequote}), $method) AND $__conditionalAll(status_msg IN (${status_msg:singlequote}), $status_msg) AND $__conditionalAll(geoip_country IN (${geoip_country:singlequote}), $geoip_country) AND $__conditionalAll(toString(geoip_asn) IN (${geoip_asn:singlequote}), $geoip_asn) AND $__conditionalAll(geoip_asn_country IN (${geoip_asn_country:singlequote}), $geoip_asn_country) AND $__conditionalAll(reputation_decision IN (${reputation_decision:singlequote}), $reputation_decision) AND $__conditionalAll(geoip_status IN (${geoip_status:singlequote}), $geoip_status) AND $__conditionalAll(geoip_source IN (${geoip_source:singlequote}), $geoip_source) AND $__conditionalAll(reputation_source IN (${reputation_source:singlequote}), $reputation_source) AND $__conditionalAll(grant_type IN (${grant_type:singlequote}), $grant_type) AND (${exclude_identities:singlequote} = '' OR NOT has(splitByChar(',', ${exclude_identities:singlequote}), if(username != '', username, account))) AND (geoip_privacy_detected = 1 OR geoip_is_hosting_network = 1 OR geoip_privacy_data_stale = 1) ORDER BY ts DESC LIMIT ${table_page_size:raw}

panels.title: Recent privacy-attributed events

targets.rawSql: SELECT ts AS time, deployment, instance, service, proto, method, if(username = '', account, username) AS identity, client_ip, geoip_country AS country, geoip_privacy_lookup_state AS privacy_state, geoip_privacy_primary_class AS privacy_primary, geoip_privacy_classes AS privacy_classes, geoip_is_tor_exit_node AS tor_exit, geoip_is_known_vpn_exit AS known_vpn, geoip_is_community_vpn_exit AS community_vpn, geoip_is_public_proxy AS public_proxy, geoip_is_privacy_relay AS privacy_relay, geoip_is_hosting_network AS hosting_network, geoip_privacy_data_stale AS privacy_stale, multiIf(authenticated = 1, 'success', authenticated = 0, 'failed', 'unknown') AS outcome, http_status, status_msg, latency, decision_sources, brute_force_counter, failed_login_count, dyn_threat, reputation_score, reputation_positive_score, reputation_negative_score, reputation_decision, reputation_samples, prot_reason, prot_delay_ms, rwp, repeating, session FROM ${log_table:raw} WHERE $__timeFilter_ms(ts) AND $__conditionalAll(service IN (${service:singlequote}), $service) AND $__conditionalAll(proto IN (${proto:singlequote}), $proto) AND $__conditionalAll(method IN (${method:singlequote}), $method) AND $__conditionalAll(status_msg IN (${status_msg:singlequote}), $status_msg) AND $__conditionalAll(geoip_country IN (${geoip_country:singlequote}), $geoip_country) AND $__conditionalAll(toString(geoip_asn) IN (${geoip_asn:singlequote}), $geoip_asn) AND $__conditionalAll(geoip_asn_country IN (${geoip_asn_country:singlequote}), $geoip_asn_country) AND $__conditionalAll(reputation_decision IN (${reputation_decision:singlequote}), $reputation_decision) AND $__conditionalAll(geoip_status IN (${geoip_status:singlequote}), $geoip_status) AND $__conditionalAll(geoip_source IN (${geoip_source:singlequote}), $geoip_source) AND $__conditionalAll(reputation_source IN (${reputation_source:singlequote}), $reputation_source) AND $__conditionalAll(grant_type IN (${grant_type:singlequote}), $grant_type) AND (${exclude_identities:singlequote} = '' OR NOT has(splitByChar(',', ${exclude_identities:singlequote}), if(username != '', username, account))) AND (authenticated = 0 OR decision_sources != '' OR dyn_threat > 0 OR prot_active = 1 OR brute_force_counter > 0 OR failed_login_count > 0 OR reputation_decision != '' OR reputation_positive_score > 0 OR rwp = 1 OR repeating = 1 OR geoip_privacy_detected = 1 OR geoip_is_hosting_network = 1 OR geoip_privacy_data_stale = 1) ORDER BY ts DESC LIMIT ${table_page_size:raw} OFFSET (${table_page:raw} - 1) * ${table_page_size:raw}

SELECT ts AS time, deployment, instance, service, proto, method, if(username = '', account, username) AS identity, client_ip, geoip_country AS country, geoip_privacy_lookup_state AS privacy_state, geoip_privacy_primary_class AS privacy_primary, geoip_privacy_classes AS privacy_classes, multiIf(authenticated = 1, 'success', authenticated = 0, 'failed', 'unknown') AS outcome, http_status, status_msg, latency, decision_sources, reputation_decision, reputation_score, reputation_samples, user_agent FROM ${log_table:raw} WHERE $__timeFilter_ms(ts) AND $__conditionalAll(service IN (${service:singlequote}), $service) AND $__conditionalAll(proto IN (${proto:singlequote}), $proto) AND $__conditionalAll(method IN (${method:singlequote}), $method) AND $__conditionalAll(status_msg IN (${status_msg:singlequote}), $status_msg) AND $__conditionalAll(geoip_country IN (${geoip_country:singlequote}), $geoip_country) AND $__conditionalAll(toString(geoip_asn) IN (${geoip_asn:singlequote}), $geoip_asn) AND $__conditionalAll(geoip_asn_country IN (${geoip_asn_country:singlequote}), $geoip_asn_country) AND $__conditionalAll(reputation_decision IN (${reputation_decision:singlequote}), $reputation_decision) AND $__conditionalAll(geoip_status IN (${geoip_status:singlequote}), $geoip_status) AND $__conditionalAll(geoip_source IN (${geoip_source:singlequote}), $geoip_source) AND $__conditionalAll(reputation_source IN (${reputation_source:singlequote}), $reputation_source) AND $__conditionalAll(grant_type IN (${grant_type:singlequote}), $grant_type) AND (${exclude_identities:singlequote} = '' OR NOT has(splitByChar(',', ${exclude_identities:singlequote}), if(username != '', username, account))) ORDER BY ts DESC LIMIT ${table_page_size:raw} OFFSET (${table_page:raw} - 1) * ${table_page_size:raw}

list.label: Reputation source
list.name: reputation_source
list.query: SELECT reputation_source FROM ${log_table:raw} WHERE $__timeFilter_ms(ts) AND (${exclude_identities:singlequote} = '' OR NOT has(splitByChar(',', ${exclude_identities:singlequote}), if(username != '', username, account))) AND reputation_source != '' GROUP BY reputation_source ORDER BY reputation_source
